reviews.comment:
Un lugar de placer, no solo de descanso. Buena atención y un parque arbolado que invitan a tomar unos mates antes de continuar viaje. Parada obligada

(Translated by Google)
A place of pleasure, not just rest. Excellent service and a leafy park that invites you to enjoy some mate before continuing your journey. A must-stop.
